creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
I think there might be something wrong with your tree because there shouldn't be an option available to toggle GUI using nox11

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/net/wireshark/Makefile#n48

/usr/ports/net/wireshark # make FLAVOR=nox11 showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for wireshark-nox11-4.0.4:
     ANDROIDDUMP=off: Build androiddump extcap tool
     DOCS=off: Build and/or install documentation
     GNUTLS=on: Enable crypto support for SSL and IPSec via GnuTLS
     LIBSSH=on: Enable libssh support (req by cisco/ssh/wifidump)
     LTO=on: Use Link-Time Optimization
     LUA=off: Lua scripting language support
     MANPAGES=off: Build and/or install manual pages
     MAXMIND=on: Enable MaxMindDB-based GeoIP geolocation support
     SNMP=on: SNMP network protocol support
====> GSSAPI Security API support: you have to select exactly one of them
     GSSAPI_BASE=on: GSSAPI support via base system (needs Kerberos)
     GSSAPI_HEIMDAL=off: GSSAPI support via security/heimdal
     GSSAPI_MIT=off: GSSAPI support via security/krb5
     GSSAPI_NONE=off: Disable GSSAPI support
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings

make FLAVOR=nox11 -V CMAKE_ARGS
... -DBUILD_wireshark:BOOL=false ...

Best regards,
Daniel
